title: 12 x 36 Inch Green Miners Moss 10mm Thick Sluice Box Matting Gold Panning
description:
Easily trap gold in your sluice box with the ASR Outdoor Green Miner's Moss! The ASR Outdoor Green Miner's Moss is the best material for catching gold. The woven vinyl loop material features thousands of gold traps throughout the matting. Gold pickers (the small nuggets you can pick up) will simply get stuck in the material! Each roll of miner's moss measures 12" x 36" and is 10mm thick, which will fit most standard sluice boxes. Make sure to grab a roll of this sluice box matting before your next gold prospecting adventure!
